bob.description: A deep voiced man with a subtle Australian accent and a measured speaking style.

darren.ref_text: A birch canoe slid smoothly on the calm lake surface. A thick fog crept over the jagged mountain peaks at dawn. Young children should avoid taking those strong medicines without guidance.

gary.description: A refined British male newsreader in his 40s with an impeccably controlled, authoritative voice. His pronunciation is crystal clear with perfect received pronunciation (RP) accent. Every syllable is precisely articulated with measured pacing. His tone is calm, confident, and professional - the epitome of BBC World Service broadcasting. Crisp consonants, neutral pitch, no vocal fry or uptalk. Speaks with gravitas and clarity.
